name: mcp-trust
description: Commercial-grade 48-substep security audit of MCP servers, AI agents, and agentic OAuth flows against the SANS/AWS 2025 agentic-AI threat taxonomy plus a Supply Chain & Dependency Security pillar. Architectural flowchart + live substep tracker, per-substep severity rubric, weighted 0-10 trust score, top-3 risks, remediation roadmap, AWS compliance mapping. Live CVE / advisory cross-reference (NVD, MITRE, GitHub Advisory DB, OSV.dev, CISA KEV, Exploit-DB, CERT/CC, Snyk, OpenCVE, CVEdetails, HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Hacker News). Jurisdictional supply-chain risk screening anchored to OFAC, EU, UN, and US BIS sanctions frameworks plus NIST SP 800-161 and EO 14028.
